title: BUILD: CSS Custom Properties (Design Tokens)
summary: Implemented CSS custom properties per design doc. Added :root block with 22 design tokens (colors, radii, transition). Replaced all ~50 hardcoded values in UI chrome CSS with var() references. Converted inline style on scope input. Pure refactor — zero visual change. Rebuilt frontend, verified health (5 games, healthy).
nextSteps: QA should verify no visual regression
Next pipeline: pick new research topic or advance mobile-touch-support design
